fields.title: Scene mode
fields.description: Specify scene mode.
fields.translatedDescription: Specify scene mode.

fields.title: Cesium Ion API access token
fields.description: Cesium Ion account users may use their personal API keys to be able to use their Cesium Ion assets(tile data, 3D data, etc) with their project.
fields.translatedDescription: Cesium Ion account users may use their personal API keys to be able to use their Cesium Ion assets(tile data, 3D data, etc) with their project.

fields.title: VR
fields.description: Enable VR mode to split the screen into left and right.
fields.translatedDescription: Enable VR mode to split the screen into left and right.

fields.title: Zoom level
fields.description: Change the zoom level of the selected tile map. Min:0, Max:25
fields.translatedDescription: Change the zoom level of the selected tile map. Min:0, Max:25

fields.title: Opacity
fields.description: Change the opacity of the selected tile map. Min: 0 Max: 1
fields.translatedDescription: Change the opacity of the selected tile map. Min: 0 Max: 1

fields.title: Enable
fields.description: Show elevation when close to the surface.
fields.translatedDescription: Show elevation when close to the surface.

fields.title: Terrain type
fields.description: Specify terrain type.
fields.translatedDescription: Specify terrain type.

fields.title: Terrain Cesium Ion asset ID
fields.description: Specify the ID of a terrain asset registered on Cesium Ion.
fields.translatedDescription: Specify the ID of a terrain asset registered on Cesium Ion.

fields.title: Terrain Cesium Ion access token
fields.description: Specify a Cesium Ion access token if you want to override the access token in the scene-wide settings for this tile.
fields.translatedDescription: Specify a Cesium Ion access token if you want to override the access token in the scene-wide settings for this tile.

fields.title: Terrain URL
fields.description: Specify the URL of Cesium's terrain server if it is delivered on-premises rather than Cesum Ion. This takes precedence over the asset ID setting.
fields.translatedDescription: Specify the URL of Cesium's terrain server if it is delivered on-premises rather than Cesum Ion. This takes precedence over the asset ID setting.

fields.title: Terrain exaggeration
fields.description: A scalar used to exaggerate the terrain. Defaults to 1.0 (no exaggeration). A value of 2.0 scales the terrain by 2x. A value of 0.0 makes the terrain completely flat.
fields.translatedDescription: A scalar used to exaggerate the terrain. Defaults to 1.0 (no exaggeration). A value of 2.0 scales the terrain by 2x. A value of 0.0 makes the terrain completely flat.

fields.title: Terrain exaggeration relative height
fields.description: The height from which terrain is exaggerated. Defaults to 0.0. Terrain that is above this height will scale upwards and terrain that is below this height will scale downwards.
fields.translatedDescription: The height from which terrain is exaggerated. Defaults to 0.0. Terrain that is above this height will scale upwards and terrain that is below this height will scale downwards.

fields.title: Enable
fields.description: This property will support the globe receive an Entity's Lighting.
fields.translatedDescription: This property will support the globe receive an Entity's Lighting.

fields.title: Enable
fields.description: This property will support the globe receive an Entity's shadows.
fields.translatedDescription: This property will support the globe receive an Entity's shadows.

fields.title: Enable
fields.description: This setting handles the so-called atmosphere effect of Earth.
fields.translatedDescription: This setting handles the so-called atmosphere effect of Earth.

fields.title: Light Intensity
fields.description: Change the light intensity of the selected tile map. Min: 0 Max: 30
fields.translatedDescription: Change the light intensity of the selected tile map. Min: 0 Max: 30

fields.title: Enable
fields.description: Description needed.
fields.translatedDescription: Description needed.

fields.title: Enable
fields.description: Description needed.
fields.translatedDescription: Description needed.

fields.title: Enable
fields.description: Description needed.
fields.translatedDescription: Description needed.

fields.title: Enable
fields.description: Description neeeded.
fields.translatedDescription: Description neeeded.

fields.title: Light Intensity
fields.description: Change the light intensity of the selected tile map. Min: 0 Max: 200
fields.translatedDescription: Change the light intensity of the selected tile map. Min: 0 Max: 200

fields.title: Initial camera position
fields.description: You can set an initial camera position to ensure that the same area is viewed each time the project is opened.
fields.translatedDescription: You can set an initial camera position to ensure that the same area is viewed each time the project is opened.

fields.title: Enter the ground
fields.description: When this property is set to true, the camera can move through the terrain, allowing it to enter underground areas.
fields.translatedDescription: When this property is set to true, the camera can move through the terrain, allowing it to enter underground areas.

fields.title: FOV
fields.description: The field of view (FOV) of the camera, in radians. It defines the vertical angular extent of the scene visible to the camera. And the range supported in our system is from 0.1 to 2.0
fields.translatedDescription: The field of view (FOV) of the camera, in radians. It defines the vertical angular extent of the scene visible to the camera. And the range supported in our system is from 0.1 to 2.0

extensions.description: Select here to find scene settings in the right panel. This includes setting map tiles, atmospheric conditions, real lighting, and more.
extensions.name: Cesium
extensions.translatedDescription: Select here to find scene settings in the right panel. This includes setting map tiles, atmospheric conditions, real lighting, and more.

extensions.description: Create an information area that appears when a layer is highlighted. Text, pictures, video, etc can be added to an infobox.
extensions.name: Infobox
extensions.translatedDescription: Create an information area that appears when a layer is highlighted. Text, pictures, video, etc can be added to an infobox.

extensions.description: An Icon marker that allows you to set a photo that will appear after reaching its location.
extensions.name: Photo overlay
extensions.translatedDescription: An Icon marker that allows you to set a photo that will appear after reaching its location.

extensions.description: Import your own primitives to be used instead of Re:Earth's built in ones.
extensions.name: File
extensions.translatedDescription: Import your own primitives to be used instead of Re:Earth's built in ones.

extensions.description: A unique start screen that will display on load of your archive(ex. display the archive's title).
extensions.name: Splash screen
extensions.translatedDescription: A unique start screen that will display on load of your archive(ex. display the archive's title).

extensions.description: SA feature that enables you to create a story. Connect points in a meaningful way so that your information can be consumed and understood easily.
extensions.name: Storytelling
extensions.translatedDescription: SA feature that enables you to create a story. Connect points in a meaningful way so that your information can be consumed and understood easily.

extensions.description: Defines how layers are clustered together and displayed on earth.
extensions.name: Cluster
extensions.translatedDescription: Defines how layers are clustered together and displayed on earth.

extensions.description: A timeline widget that allows for viewing layers and data at specific points in time.
extensions.name: Timeline
extensions.translatedDescription: A timeline widget that allows for viewing layers and data at specific points in time.

extensions.description: A navigator widget that allows for viewing the earth from various angle by operating menu.
extensions.name: Navigator
extensions.translatedDescription: A navigator widget that allows for viewing the earth from various angle by operating menu.

extensions.description: A widget that allows you to search for a location on the map using Google Maps.
extensions.name: Google Map Search (Experimental)
extensions.translatedDescription: A widget that allows you to search for a location on the map using Google Maps.

extensions.description: Down button that will skip to next page.
extensions.name: Next Page Button
extensions.translatedDescription: Down button that will skip to next page.

extensions.description: Create an information area that appears when a layer is highlighted. Text, pictures, video, etc can be added to an infobox.
extensions.name: Infobox Beta
extensions.translatedDescription: Create an information area that appears when a layer is highlighted. Text, pictures, video, etc can be added to an infobox.
